ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the program */,
  "program" TEXT /* Name of the academic program the student is enrolled in */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "batch" TEXT /* Batch year of the student */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Current semester of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "online_classes" (
  "online_class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each online class session */,
  "student_id" TEXT /* ID of the student attending the class */,
  "class_date" TEXT /* Date of the class */,
  "time_spent_minutes" INTEGER /* Time spent on the online class in minutes */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating of the online class experience */,
  "medium" TEXT /* Medium used for the online class (e.g., Laptop/Desktop, Smartphone) */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the online class */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Name of the instructor teaching the class */,
  "class_link" TEXT /* Link to the online class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("online_class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_online_classes_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "self_study" (
  "self_study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each self-study session */,
  "student_id" TEXT /* ID of the student conducting the self-study */,
  "study_date" TEXT /* Date of the self-study session */,
  "time_spent_minutes" INTEGER /* Time spent on self-study in minutes */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject being studied */,
  "study_material" TEXT /* Study material used (e.g., textbook, online resources) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("self_study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_self_study_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fitness_activities" (
  "fitness_activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fitness activity */,
  "student_id" TEXT /* ID of the student engaging in the activity */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the fitness activity */,
  "time_spent_minutes" INTEGER /* Time spent on the fitness activity in minutes */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of fitness activity (e.g., running, yoga) */,
  "calories_burned" INTEGER /* Estimated calories burned during the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fitness_activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fitness_activities_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sleep_patterns" (
  "sleep_pattern_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sleep pattern entry */,
  "student_id" TEXT /* ID of the student */,
  "sleep_date" TEXT /* Date of the sleep entry */,
  "time_spent_hours" REAL /* Time spent sleeping in hours */,
  "sleep_quality" TEXT /* Quality of sleep (e.g., good, poor) */,
  "wake_up_time" TEXT /* Wake-up time of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sleep_pattern_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sleep_patterns_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media_usage" (
  "social_media_usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media usage entry */,
  "student_id" TEXT /* ID of the student */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date of the social media usage */,
  "time_spent_minutes" INTEGER /* Time spent on social media in minutes */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Preferred social media platform */,
  "social_media_platform" TEXT /* Social media platform used (e.g., Instagram, Facebook) */,
  "content_consumed" TEXT /* Type of content consumed (e.g., educational, entertainment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("social_media_usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_usage_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tv_watching" (
  "tv_watching_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each TV watching entry */,
  "student_id" TEXT /* ID of the student */,
  "watching_date" TEXT /* Date of the TV watching session */,
  "time_spent_minutes" INTEGER /* Time spent watching TV in minutes */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the TV program watched */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the TV channel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tv_watching_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tv_watching_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meal_patterns" (
  "meal_pattern_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meal pattern entry */,
  "student_id" TEXT /* ID of the student */,
  "meal_date" TEXT /* Date of the meal entry */,
  "number_of_meals" INTEGER /* Number of meals consumed in a day */,
  "meal_type" TEXT /* Type of meal (e.g., breakfast, lunch, dinner) */,
  "dishes_consumed" TEXT /* Dishes consumed during the meal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meal_pattern_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meal_patterns_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weight_changes" (
  "weight_change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weight change entry */,
  "student_id" TEXT /* ID of the student */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the weight change entry */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the weight change (e.g., Increased, Decreased, Remain Constant) */,
  "weight_value" REAL /* Weight value (in kg or lbs) */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the weight change (e.g., diet, exercise) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weight_change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weight_changes_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_issues" (
  "health_issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health issue entry */,
  "student_id" TEXT /* ID of the student */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date of the health issue entry */,
  "issue_description" TEXT /* Description of the health issue (e.g., NO, specific health issue) */,
  "issue_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the health issue (e.g., mild, severe) */,
  "medication_taken" TEXT /* Medication taken for the health issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("health_issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_issues_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stress_management" (
  "stress_management_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stress management entry */,
  "student_id" TEXT /* ID of the student */,
  "management_date" TEXT /* Date of the stress management entry */,
  "technique_description" TEXT /* Description of the stress management technique (e.g., Cooking, Scrolling through social media) */,
  "technique_effectiveness" TEXT /* Effectiveness of the stress management technique (e.g., very effective, not effective) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of using the stress management technique */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stress_management_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stress_management_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_utilization" (
  "time_utilization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time utilization entry */,
  "student_id" TEXT /* ID of the student */,
  "utilization_date" TEXT /* Date of the time utilization entry */,
  "utilization_description" TEXT /* Description of how the student utilized their time (e.g., YES, NO) */,
  "connected_with_family" TEXT /* Indicates whether the student was connected with family (e.g., YES, NO) */,
  "activity_category" TEXT /* Category of activity (e.g., academic, leisure) */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_utilization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_utilization_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "missed_activities" (
  "missed_activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each missed activity entry */,
  "student_id" TEXT /* ID of the student */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the missed activity entry */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the activity missed the most (e.g., School/college, Roaming around freely) */,
  "activity_importance" TEXT /* Importance of the missed activity (e.g., very important, not important) */,
  "reason_for_missing" TEXT /* Reason for missing the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("missed_activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_missed_activities_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "survey_name" TEXT /* Name of the survey */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the survey */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the survey */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the survey */,
  "survey_type" TEXT /* Type of survey (e.g., multiple-choice, open-ended) */,
  "response_rate" REAL /* Response rate of the survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id")
)
